allow: PowerShell(docker exec data-agent-postgres-1 psql -U admin -d dataagent -c "SELECT id, name, slug FROM tenants; SELECT id, name, model_id, type, is_default FROM llm_providers; SELECT id, name, status FROM agents; SELECT id, agent_id, version, status FROM agent_versions;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec data-agent-postgres-1 psql -U admin -d dataagent -c "SELECT id, name, is_active FROM agents; SELECT id, agent_id, version, status FROM agent_versions;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec data-agent-postgres-1 psql -U admin -d dataagent -c "\\dt" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec -i data-agent-postgres-1 psql -U admin -d dataagent)
PowerShell(docker exec data-agent-postgres-1 psql -U admin -d dataagent -c "SELECT id, user_ref, channel, created_at FROM conversations ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;")
